body_preview: Wire `state::stash_diagnostic_error()` into the StreamingBashTool's error return paths so that bash command execution failures (spawn errors, timeouts, wait failures) leave diagnostic traces visible via `/state crashes`. Why this matters: The crash reporter was wired into 2 doors last session (state init in lib.rs, transport failures in deepseek.rs). The ass
title: Wire crash reporter into StreamingBashTool execution failures
